name: Quick & Easy Cheese or Chicken Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: La Victoria Enchilada sauce (1 large can)
Chicken breast, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9" x 13" baking dish with Pam cooking spray.
2. Place a small amount of enchilada sauce in the bottom of the pan.
3. Heat tortillas in the microwave to soften them.
4. Fill each tortilla with chicken, cheese, or both.
5. Fold the tortillas over and place seam side down in the pan.
6. Cover with remaining enchilada sauce and sprinkle with grated jack and cheddar cheeses.
7. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F.
